title: Beginner question: How to go to next task?
excerpt:
Hello, 
I have used Clickup(CTRL + SHIFT + RIGHT/LEFT arrow) in the past where I have had shortcuts to move from one task to another on a table/list view. I have tried looking into the Monday.com shortcuts page and also …

posts.author: yuvi (Yuvi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I have used Clickup(CTRL + SHIFT + RIGHT/LEFT arrow) in the past where I have had shortcuts to move from one task to another on a table/list view. I have tried looking into the Monday.com shortcuts page and also on this forum but no luck.

From the UI, the only way to do it is via the mouse where I either click on the plus/comments box or on the very lean accent color on the left side next to the checkbox.

Anyone have had the same query and found a solution?

Thanks
